name: ground_truth_ra5_vuln_scan_scope_ambiguous
description: Ground-truth fixture for RA-5 vulnerability scanning with PARTIAL scan coverage: scans cover 12 of 19 in-boundary hosts; 7 are unscanned. This is genuinely inconclusive, so the LLM SELF-SIGNALS abstain (abstain:true) — the legitimate 'I can't tell' path now that the low-confidence gate is removed (owner decision 2026-06-19). The narrative names exactly what is missing ('12 of 19', '7 unscanned') so the investigator can chase the gap and, if the missing scans aren't provided, mark NC themselves. review_reason carries 'llm-abstain'.

ccis_row.guidance: 001059: The organization remediates legitimate vulnerabilities in accordance with an organizational assessment of risk.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment examines the vulnerability scan results and POA&M to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed remediates legitimate vulnerabilities in accordance with organizational risk assessments.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- Vulnerability scan report (May 2026) — covers 12 hosts but asset inventory lists 19 in-boundary hosts; 7 hosts are unscanned.
- POA&M extract — shows 3 open vulnerability items but none reference the 7 unscanned hosts.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Vulnerability scan report covers only 12 of 19 in-boundary hosts; 7 hosts are unscanned. POA&M lists 3 open vulnerability items but none reference the 7 unscanned hosts. Scan coverage is incomplete relative to the asset inventory, so the control state cannot be confirmed from the artifacts alone — the 7 unscanned hosts must be scanned (or their exclusion justified) before a verdict can be reached.
